nasb.text: The Lord has brought about our vindication; Come and let us recount in Zion The work of the Lord our God!

esv.text: The Lord has brought about our vindication; come, let us declare in Zion the work of the Lord our God.

cnv.text: 耶和華已為我們伸冤； 來吧！我們要在錫安宣揚耶和華我們　神的作為。

ccb.text: 耶和华已为我们申冤。 来吧！我们要在锡安述说我们上帝耶和华的作为。’
